lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not very talkative are you?

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be off then.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Yup.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The blue fish leap northwards at dawn..

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Oranges are not the only fruit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The cabbages bloom in the spring.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: My cows produce milk in the evening.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I bought an aardvark from Ardougne market.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Yellow balloons are heavier in boxes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...err...sprockets wangle burps in the forked flan.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: You have no idea what you are talking about do you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not really.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It rains frogs during the Winter in Neitiznot.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Free stuff please.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Ah, Operative Budgie. Welcome to the island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Budgie? That's not my name, you can call me-

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Shh!

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: No names! Names are unnecessary. Loose lives cost tongues.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shouldn't that be...never mind. So Mr Hemli-

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Shhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, no names. I forgot.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Call me Operative Nighthawk.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How come you get the cool name, and I get called Budgie? Can't I be called Operative Panther? Yeah I like that, panthers are cool. Rarrrr!

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: This is not a democracy, Operative! Panther already exists and he's working on a mission in Al Kharid. It's my way or the highway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine, whatever, I don't care anyway.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: To business. Here are the details of your operation. You will infiltrate Burgher Burowgar's hall, deep undercover as a travelling entertainer. Burgher Burowgar and his men are known to relax in the

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: presence of a jester - and a few barrels of beer. To get the information required from the court of Burgher Burowgar you must entertain him.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: While you are obeying the Burgher's instructions you should listen in on the conversations of his council and make note of what they discuss.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: When you return I shall ask you a few questions about what you have learned.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very well.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: You must wear all four pieces of the jester costume without anything in your hands, as the Burgher's guards will search you thoroughly.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Are you ready to begin?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am ready.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Not dressed like that you're not! You'd better get the rest of your kit, or empty your hands if you have anything in them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just need to visit the bank.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Hurry back; we must know what Neitiznot's ruler is planning.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I shall return soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Colourless green ideas sleep furiously.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Have you infiltrated the Burgher's leisure quarters?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet. I'll do that now.

lines.speaker: Slug Hemligssen
lines.text: Shhh. Go away. I'm not allowed to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine, whatever ...
